description_long: This upright vacuum cleaner features a tall, vertical body with a prominent handle at the top for easy maneuvering. The main body is composed of a cylindrical dust container with a transparent section, allowing visibility of collected debris, and is accented by a purple ring near the top. The base is wide and rectangular, housing the suction head and likely containing rotating brushes for effective cleaning. Two large wheels are attached at the rear for smooth movement across surfaces, and a hose is visible running along the side, suggesting additional cleaning attachments. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcements, and the design is modern and functional. No visible brand logo or power cord is present in the images.
description: A modern upright vacuum cleaner with a transparent dust container, purple accents, and a wide cleaning base. It features a tall handle and rear wheels for easy movement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide cleaning base, central dust container, and handle extending vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical dust container, rear wheels, and hose attachment along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handle, wheel placement, and the back of the cleaning base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dust container, wheels, and the hose attachment from a different angle.
attribute_handle_design: Tall, straight handle integrated at the top, ergonomically shaped for gripping, with a slight curve for comfort.
attribute_wheel_type: Two large, round rear wheels made of hard plastic or rubber, designed for smooth rolling.
